_comment: Drop-in Claude Desktop / Cursor MCP config for the SZL governed-tool endpoints. The canonical live MCP transports are served same-origin by the application Spaces themselves: a11oy (https://szlholdings-a11oy.hf.space/mcp/) and killinchu (https://szlholdings-killinchu.hf.space/mcp/). Protocol 2024-11-05, JSON-RPC 2.0 over HTTP. GET /mcp/ returns a discovery card with the live tool list (currently 5 governed tools: retrieve_context, policy_check, trust_score, sign_receipt, verify_receipt). The earlier standalone hatun-mcp / mcp-receipts-server Spaces are retired. Use a trailing slash on /mcp/; Accept should include application/json.
